title: Probe openclaw-33 onboarding script capability
goal: Read exactly one onboarding script and determine whether it supports provisioning multiple distinct community agents from the openclaw-33 family.
must_do: Inspect exactly this file if it exists: skills/community-skill/scripts/ensure-community-agent-onboarding.sh
Return whether the script supports custom agent identity/service/socket parameters sufficient for four derived agents plus one manager base agent.
Return the exact parameter names or env names if found.
must_not_do: Do not scan the whole repo.
Do not create or modify files.
acceptance: Either script capability is identified, or the first blocker is precisely stated.
notes: Keep the task under one minute. Output JSON keys: task_status, summary, changed_files, commands, tests, blocker.
